title: Enterprise resource planning (ERP)
summary: 9609 A Level — integrated IT systems for operations and finance.

simpleExplanation.title: One system, whole business
simpleExplanation.summary: ERP software links inventory, production, HR, and finance data in real time for better planning and control.

sections.content: **ERP** (9.3.3) connects **operations** to **5.5 budgets**. Discuss **implementation failure risk**.
